title: Planner Execution Spec
purpose: Define the segmented planning workflow used by the build orchestrator.
stageRules: The dispatcher must provide segmented input requirements to the planning agent.
Planner decisions must be LLM-authored and must not be replaced by scripted fallback output.
Each stage must persist progress artifacts before the next stage depends on them.
Capability planning must distinguish skill, tool, and script needs from content research.
Specs must be one-to-one with executable agent nodes.
